summary: Verified /compose, /compose/runtimes, /compose/orchestrator, and /api/library with all requested runtime assertions and no console errors.
steps: navigate to /compose and assert Agent faculties, Dev faculties, and Runtimes presence
navigate to /compose/runtimes and assert Claude Code, Agent SDK, Codex, and Gemini runtime entries
navigate to /compose/orchestrator and assert Global config plus primary_runtime default
fetch GET /api/library and assert required runtime ids exist
capture browser console errors and runtime exceptions during navigation
